messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个贪食蛇游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个AI对手，它会和我抢食物。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个贪食蛇游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>贪食蛇游戏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="360" height="640"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, paused, gameover
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('snakeHighScore') || 0;
        
        // 蛇相关
        let snake = [];
        let food = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        let direction = 'right';
        let nextDirection = 'right';
        let gridSize = 20;
        let gridWidth = Math.floor(canvas.width / gridSize);
        let gridHeight = Math.floor(canvas.height / gridSize);
        let gameAreaTop = 50; // 为得分显示留出空间
        
        // 时间控制
        let lastTime = 0;
        let moveInterval = 150; // 蛇移动间隔（毫秒）
        let timeSinceLastMove = 0;
        
        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            // 初始化蛇
            snake = [
                { x: 5, y: Math.floor(gridHeight / 2) },
                { x: 4, y: Math.floor(gridHeight / 2) },
                { x: 3, y: Math.floor(gridHeight / 2) }
            ];
            direction = 'right';
            nextDirection = 'right';
            score = 0;
            spawnFood();
        }
        
        // 生成食物
        function spawnFood() {
            let validPosition = false;
            while (!validPosition) {
                food.x = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridWidth);
                food.y = Math.floor(Math.random() * (gridHeight - 2)) + 1; // 避免在顶部和底部边缘
                validPosition = true;
                
                // 检查食物是否与蛇重叠
                for (let segment of snake) {
                    if (segment.x === food.x && segment.y === food.y) {
                        validPosition = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;
            
            timeSinceLastMove += deltaTime;
            
            if (timeSinceLastMove >= moveInterval) {
                timeSinceLastMove = 0;
                direction = nextDirection;
                
                // 计算新头部位置
                let head = { x: snake[0].x, y: snake[0].y };
                switch (direction) {
                    case 'up': head.y--; break;
                    case 'down': head.y++; break;
                    case 'left': head.x--; break;
                    case 'right': head.x++; break;
                }
                
                // 检查碰撞
                if (checkCollision(head)) {
                    gameState = 'gameover';
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
                    }
                    return;
                }
                
                // 移动蛇
                snake.unshift(head);
                
                // 检查是否吃到食物
                if (head.x === food.x && head.y === food.y) {
                    score += 10;
                    spawnFood();
                } else {
                    snake.pop();
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 检查碰撞
        function checkCollision(head) {
            // 撞墙
            if (head.x < 0 || head.x >= gridWidth || head.y < 1 || head.y >= gridHeight) {
                return true;
            }
            
            // 撞自己
            for (let i = 1; i < snake.length; i++) {
                if (head.x === snake[i].x && head.y === snake[i].y) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            
            return false;
        }
        
        // 渲染游戏
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // 绘制背景渐变
            let gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // 绘制游戏区域背景
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, gameAreaTop, canvas.width, canvas.height - gameAreaTop);
            
            // 绘制网格线（可选，增加视觉效果）
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for (let x = 0; x <= gridWidth; x++) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x * gridSize, gameAreaTop);
                ctx.lineTo(x * gridSize, canvas.height);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            for (let y = 0; y <= gridHeight; y++) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(0, y * gridSize);
                ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, y * gridSize);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            
            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 40, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);
            
            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 50);
            
            // 绘制食物
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.shadowColor = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
            ctx.fillRect(
                food.x * gridSize + 2,
                food.y * gridSize + 2,
                gridSize - 4,
                gridSize - 4
            );
            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
            
            // 绘制蛇
            for (let i = 0; i < snake.length; i++) {
                let segment = snake[i];
                if (i === 0) {
                    // 蛇头
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                    ctx.shadowColor = '#4fd1c5';
                    ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
                } else {
                    // 蛇身
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#38b2ac';
                    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
                }
                ctx.fillRect(
                    segment.x * gridSize + 1,
                    segment.y * gridSize + 1,
                    gridSize - 2,
                    gridSize - 2
                );
            }
            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
            
            // 绘制游戏状态界面
            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawOverlay('贪食蛇', '按任意键开始游戏', '使用方向键或WASD控制');
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                drawOverlay('游戏暂停', '按P或ESC继续', '按R重新开始');
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawOverlay('游戏结束', '得分: ' + score, '按任意键重新开始');
            }
        }
        
        // 绘制覆盖层
        function drawOverlay(title, subtitle, hint) {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText(title, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);
            
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(subtitle, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 10);
            
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(hint, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 50);
        }
        
        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;
            
            switch (gameState) {
                case 'menu':
                    if (key !== 'p' && key !== 'P' && key !== 'Escape') {
                        gameState = 'playing';
                        initGame();
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case 'playing':
                    switch (key) {
                        case 'ArrowUp':
                        case 'w':
                        case 'W':
                            if (direction !== 'down') nextDirection = 'up';
                            break;
                        case 'ArrowDown':
                        case 's':
                        case 'S':
                            if (direction !== 'up') nextDirection = 'down';
                            break;
                        case 'ArrowLeft':
                        case 'a':
                        case 'A':
                            if (direction !== 'right') nextDirection = 'left';
                            break;
                        case 'ArrowRight':
                        case 'd':
                        case 'D':
                            if (direction !== 'left') nextDirection = 'right';
                            break;
                        case 'p':
                        case 'P':
                        case 'Escape':
                            gameState = 'paused';
                            break;
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case 'paused':
                    if (key === 'p' || key === 'P' || key === 'Escape') {
                        gameState = 'playing';
                    } else if (key === 'r' || key === 'R') {
                        gameState = 'playing';
                        initGame();
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case 'gameover':
                    if (key !== 'p' && key !== 'P' && key !== 'Escape') {
                        gameState = 'playing';
                        initGame();
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }
        
        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
            // 防止方向键滚动页面
            if (['ArrowUp', 'ArrowDown', 'ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight', ' '].includes(e.key)) {
                e.preventDefault();
            }
        });
        
        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(timestamp) {
            let deltaTime = timestamp - lastTime;
            lastTime = timestamp;
            
            update(deltaTime);
            render();
            
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }
        
        // 开始游戏
        initGame();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个AI对手，它会和我抢食物。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Food Race - AI Opponent</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #0f0f23;
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="360" height="640"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu';
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('foodRaceHighScore') || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;

        // 玩家
        const player = {
            x: 100,
            y: 500,
            radius: 20,
            speed: 200,
            color: '#4fd1c5'
        };

        // AI对手
        const ai = {
            x: 260,
            y: 500,
            radius: 20,
            speed: 180,
            color: '#ff6b6b',
            targetFood: null
        };

        // 食物数组
        let foods = [];
        const FOOD_RADIUS = 10;
        const MAX_FOODS = 3;
        const FOOD_SPAWN_INTERVAL = 2000;
        let foodSpawnTimer = 0;

        // 输入状态
        const keys = {
            ArrowUp: false,
            ArrowDown: false,
            ArrowLeft: false,
            ArrowRight: false,
            KeyW: false,
            KeyS: false,
            KeyA: false,
            KeyD: false
        };

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            score = 0;
            player.x = 100;
            player.y = 500;
            ai.x = 260;
            ai.y = 500;
            foods = [];
            spawnFood();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }

        // 生成食物
        function spawnFood() {
            if (foods.length < MAX_FOODS) {
                const margin = 30;
                const x = margin + Math.random() * (canvas.width - 2 * margin);
                const y = margin + Math.random() * (canvas.height - 2 * margin - 100);
                foods.push({
                    x: x,
                    y: y,
                    radius: FOOD_RADIUS,
                    color: '#ffd166'
                });
            }
        }

        // 处理输入
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (key in keys) {
                keys[key] = pressed;
            }

            if (pressed) {
                if (gameState === 'menu' && (key === 'Space' || key === 'Enter')) {
                    initGame();
                } else if (gameState === 'playing' && (key === 'KeyP' || key === 'Escape')) {
                    gameState = 'paused';
                } else if (gameState === 'paused' && (key === 'KeyP' || key === 'Space')) {
                    gameState = 'playing';
                } else if (gameState === 'gameover' && (key === 'Space' || key === 'Enter')) {
                    initGame();
                }
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(dt) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            deltaTime = dt;

            // 更新食物生成计时器
            foodSpawnTimer += dt;
            if (foodSpawnTimer >= FOOD_SPAWN_INTERVAL) {
                spawnFood();
                foodSpawnTimer = 0;
            }

            // 玩家移动
            if (keys.ArrowUp || keys.KeyW) player.y -= player.speed * dt;
            if (keys.ArrowDown || keys.KeyS) player.y += player.speed * dt;
            if (keys.ArrowLeft || keys.KeyA) player.x -= player.speed * dt;
            if (keys.ArrowRight || keys.KeyD) player.x += player.speed * dt;

            // 限制玩家在画布内
            player.x = Math.max(player.radius, Math.min(canvas.width - player.radius, player.x));
            player.y = Math.max(player.radius, Math.min(canvas.height - player.radius, player.y));

            // AI移动逻辑：寻找最近的食物
            if (foods.length > 0) {
                let nearestFood = null;
                let minDist = Infinity;
                
                for (let food of foods) {
                    const dist = Math.hypot(ai.x - food.x, ai.y - food.y);
                    if (dist < minDist) {
                        minDist = dist;
                        nearestFood = food;
                    }
                }
                
                if (nearestFood) {
                    const angle = Math.atan2(nearestFood.y - ai.y, nearestFood.x - ai.x);
                    ai.x += Math.cos(angle) * ai.speed * dt;
                    ai.y += Math.sin(angle) * ai.speed * dt;
                }
            }

            // 限制AI在画布内
            ai.x = Math.max(ai.radius, Math.min(canvas.width - ai.radius, ai.x));
            ai.y = Math.max(ai.radius, Math.min(canvas.height - ai.radius, ai.y));

            // 碰撞检测：玩家吃食物
            for (let i = foods.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const food = foods[i];
                const dist = Math.hypot(player.x - food.x, player.y - food.y);
                if (dist < player.radius + food.radius) {
                    foods.splice(i, 1);
                    score++;
                    spawnFood();
                }
            }

            // 碰撞检测：AI吃食物
            for (let i = foods.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const food = foods[i];
                const dist = Math.hypot(ai.x - food.x, ai.y - food.y);
                if (dist < ai.radius + food.radius) {
                    foods.splice(i, 1);
                    // AI吃食物不加分，但可以添加AI得分系统
                    spawnFood();
                }
            }

            // 游戏结束条件：例如时间限制或得分目标
            // 这里设置一个简单的条件：如果AI吃了10个食物，游戏结束
            // 为了简化，我们让游戏持续进行，直到玩家退出
            // 可以添加其他结束条件，但为了保持简单，暂时不添加
        }

        // 渲染游戏
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景（CSS已设置，但这里可以添加额外效果）
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.1)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused') {
                drawGame();
                if (gameState === 'paused') {
                    drawPauseScreen();
                }
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawGameOver();
            }

            // 绘制得分
            drawScore();
        }

        // 绘制菜单
        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('Food Race', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 60);

            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('与AI对手抢食物！', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 20);

            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格或回车开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 30);
            ctx.fillText('使用箭头键或WASD移动', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 60);
            ctx.fillText('按P或Esc暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 90);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 130);
        }

        // 绘制游戏元素
        function drawGame() {
            // 绘制食物
            for (let food of foods) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(food.x, food.y, food.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = food.color;
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.closePath();

                // 添加食物光晕效果
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(food.x, food.y, food.radius + 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.3)';
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.closePath();
            }

            // 绘制玩家
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(player.x, player.y, player.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();

            // 绘制玩家眼睛
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(player.x - 5, player.y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(player.x + 5, player.y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();

            // 绘制AI
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ai.x, ai.y, ai.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();

            // 绘制AI眼睛
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ai.x - 5, ai.y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ai.x + 5, ai.y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();

            // 绘制AI目标指示器（可选）
            if (ai.targetFood) {
                ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.5)';
                ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(ai.x, ai.y);
                ctx.lineTo(ai.targetFood.x, ai.targetFood.y);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
        }

        // 绘制暂停屏幕
        function drawPauseScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = 'bold 28px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 20);

            ctx.font = '18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按P或空格继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 20);
        }

        // 绘制游戏结束
        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 60);

            ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(`得分: ${score}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 20);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 20);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格或回车重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 70);
        }

        // 绘制得分
        function drawScore() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, 40);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = 'bold 20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'left';
            ctx.fillText('得分:', 20, 28);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.textAlign = 'right';
            ctx.fillText(score.toString(), canvas.width - 20, 28);

            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(`最高: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, 28);
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            // 计算deltaTime（秒）
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            // 限制deltaTime防止大跳跃
            if (deltaTime > 0.1) deltaTime = 0.1;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.code, true);
            e.preventDefault();
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.code, false);
        });

        // 开始游戏循环
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
